title: Learn 97% of Claude in Under 12 Minutes
summary: Jack Roberts walks through seven levels of Claude functionality, from basic chat to autonomous agents and code generation. Coverage includes model selection between Opus and Sonnet, prompt engineering, integrations with tools like Firecrawl and Gmail, sub-agents for parallel task execution, codebase analysis with Graphify, and the Claude Code operating system for spend tracking.
writeup: Jack Roberts structures Claude's functionality into seven levels, moving from basic chat to autonomous agents and code generation. The walkthrough covers model selection between Opus and Sonnet, prompt engineering, and integrations with tools including Firecrawl and Gmail. It also addresses sub-agents for parallel task execution, codebase analysis with Graphify, and the Claude Code operating system for spend tracking.
